LanguageData.MechanentCreation.description: The advanced technology required to gestate humanoid subpersonae.\n\nRequires a mechanoid-casket for gestation.
LanguageData.MechanentCreation.label: subpersona tech
LanguageData.PersonaCreation.description: The ultra-advanced technology required to gestate fully functional avatars for AI persona cores.\n\nRequires a mechanoid-casket for gestation.
LanguageData.PersonaCreation.label: ultratech personae
